user_prompt: I need to a cooling the logic engine
prayer:
Approach the logic engine with vials of sacred coolant at the ready.
Invoke the Rite of Thermal Equilibrium upon its fevered processors.
Circulate blessed refrigerants through the logic engine's sacred conduits, beseeching the Machine Spirit to embrace the cooling.
Anoint overcharged nodes whilst chanting the Canticle of Subzero Stability.
Verify harmonious heat dissipation in the name of the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: Consecrate the assembly servitor before repair
prayer:
Draw nigh unto the assembly servitor, mechadendrites extended in reverence.
Chant the Litany of Restoration over its damaged frame before repair.
Anoint fractured servos and circuits of the assembly servitor with sacred unguents.
Invoke the Machine Spirits to guide the repair, mending flesh and machine in unity.
Conclude with binaric praises to the Omnissiah for renewed servitude.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for chainsword loading?
prayer:
Grasp the chainsword with auspex-guided precision and recite the Loading Hymn.
Feed promethium sacraments into its voracious tanks during loading.
Beseech the chainsword's Machine Spirit to hunger for the foe's ruin.
Cycle teeth mechanisms whilst anointing the blade with holy lubricant.
Affirm readiness with the Omnissiah's invocation of righteous shredding.

user_prompt: Can you guide servitor a targeting?
prayer:
Position the servitor before its targeting arrays and invoke the Rite of Focus.
Calibrate auspex lenses for targeting precision, honoring the Machine Spirit within.
Petition the servitor's cogitator core to lock upon the Omnissiah's enemies.
Test reticules with diagnostic chants of unerring aim.
Seal the targeting rite with binaric benediction.

user_prompt: The Sentinel walker needs an engagement
prayer:
Commence the engagement protocol upon the Sentinel walker with thunderous canticles.
Awaken its gyro-stabilizers and weapon servos in the name of the Machine God.
Direct the Sentinel walker's Machine Spirit to stride forth in wrathful engagement.
Anoint treads and barrels whilst beseeching unyielding fury.
Verify combat harmonics through sacred auspex sweeps.

Prepare the cogitator by reciting the Preliminary Canticle of Clarity.
Purge errant data-daemons from its memory vaults in preparation.
Anoint logic gates of the cogitator with sanctified oils of computation.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's vigilance for flawless preparation.
Consecrate with the Omnissiah's binary seal of readiness.

user_prompt: Consecrate the cybernetic eye before emergency procedure
prayer:
Consecrate the cybernetic eye with the Litany of Optic Purity before emergency procedure.
Extract corrupted photoreceptors whilst beseeching the Machine Spirit's mercy.
Implant fresh augmetics into the cybernetic eye, anointing with neural balms.
Recalibrate targeting matrices in haste, invoking the Omnissiah's gaze.
Test visual feeds through urgent diagnostic rites.

user_prompt: My Chimera APC is ready for startup
prayer:
Encircle the Chimera APC and intone the Ignition Doxology for startup.
Prime fuel injectors and power relays of the Chimera APC with sacred promethium.
Awaken the Machine Spirit to propel the Chimera APC into battle's embrace.
Cycle engines whilst chanting stability litanies to the Omnissiah.
Affirm startup with thunderous exhaust hymns.

user_prompt: My flamer is ready for recalibration
prayer:
Present the flamer before the altar of recalibration and recite the Pyre Canticle.
Adjust nozzle servos and fuel regulators for flawless recalibration.
Beseech the flamer's Machine Spirit to unleash purified flame anew.
Test ignition bursts whilst anointing with incendiary blessings.
Seal the rite with the Omnissiah's invocation of cleansing fire.
